title: Spyglass Deluxe!
description: A brand new vanilla-like Spyglass model, it also changes the Spyglass scope!
body:
![The new Spyglass model laid down horrizontally as seen from the side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1501d02d47716289ccf3063ad3d432276b7166ba.png)

## About
This resource pack changes the Spyglass model to be longer and more 3-dimensional, while staying vanilla-like! it also changes the Spyglass scope to be more clean while still providing a shiny glass-like appearance.
